TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == baha == Śí≥ŚóĹ / baha sa. siwkay nu baha u baha sa, hina mabaha ku tademaw. caay kangaay ku takulaw atu bala', mabaha tuway. anu sienaw ku demiad sa, katuud tu ku mabahaay a tademaw. u adiwawa sawsawni mabaha tu. tinaku a kamu hinabaha ŚłłŚí≥ŚóĹ/ hinabaha kita i kasienawan. mabaha ŚįĪŚí≥šļÜ/ katukuhan tu tu labi sa mabaha tu kaku. mabahaay Śí≥ŚóĹÁöĄ/ u mabahaay a tademaw ci Imi. u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika . A cough is a sudden and often repetitively occurring, protective reflex, which helps to clear the large breathing passages from fluids, irritants, foreign particles and microbes. The cough reflex consists of three phases: an inhalation, a forced exhalation against a closed glottis, and a violent release of air from the lungs following opening of the glottis, usually accompanied by a distinctive sound. Coughing is either voluntary or involuntary.
S.PHON: == bańßa == ** / bańßa sa. siwkaj nu bańßa u bańßa sa, ńßina mabańßa ku tad…ômaw. ¶aaj kaŇčaaj ku takur~…ĺaw atu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, mabańßa tuwaj. anu si…ônaw ku d…ômiad sa, katuud tu ku mabańßaaj a tad…ômaw. u adiwawa sawsawni mabańßa tu. tinaku a kamu ńßinabańßa ***/ ńßinabańßa kita i kasi…ônawan. mabańßa ***/ katukuńßan tu tu r~…ĺabi sa mabańßa tu kaku. mabańßaaj ***/ u mabańßaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i imi. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika . a ¶ougńß is a sudd…ôn and oft…ôn r…ôp…ôtiti*…ôr~…ĺj o ¶ ¶urriŇč, prot…ô ¶ti*…ô r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô*, wńßi ¶ńß ńß…ôr~…ĺps to ¶r~…ĺ…ôar tńß…ô r~…ĺarg…ô br…ôatńßiŇč passag…ôs from fr~…ĺuids, irritants, for…ôign parti ¶r~…ĺ…ôs and mi ¶rob…ôs. tńß…ô ¶ougńß r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô* ¶onsists of tńßr…ô…ô pńßas…ôs: an inńßar~…ĺation, a for ¶…ôd …ô*ńßar~…ĺation against a ¶r~…ĺos…ôd gr~…ĺottis, and a *ior~…ĺ…ônt r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ô of air from tńß…ô r~…ĺuŇčs for~…ĺr~…ĺowiŇč op…ôniŇč of tńß…ô gr~…ĺottis, usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj a ¶ ¶ompani…ôd bj a distin ¶ti*…ô sound. ¶ougńßiŇč is …ôitńß…ôr *or~…ĺuntarj or in*or~…ĺuntarj.
S.FORM: == baha == Śí≥ŚóĹ / baha sa. siwkay nu baha u baha sa, hina mabaha ku tademaw. caay kangaay ku takulaw atu bala', mabaha tuway. anu sienaw ku demiad sa, katuud tu ku mabahaay a tademaw. u adiwawa sawsawni mabaha tu. tinaku a kamu hinabaha ŚłłŚí≥ŚóĹ/ hinabaha kita i kasienawan. mabaha ŚįĪŚí≥šļÜ/ katukuhan tu tu labi sa mabaha tu kaku. mabahaay Śí≥ŚóĹÁöĄ/ u mabahaay a tademaw ci Imi. u sulit nu Hulam Lipun atu Amilika . A cough is a sudden and often repetitively occurring, protective reflex, which helps to clear the large breathing passages from fluids, irritants, foreign particles and microbes. The cough reflex consists of three phases: an inhalation, a forced exhalation against a closed glottis, and a violent release of air from the lungs following opening of the glottis, usually accompanied by a distinctive sound. Coughing is either voluntary or involuntary.
S.PHON: == bańßa == ** / bańßa sa. siwkaj nu bańßa u bańßa sa, ńßina mabańßa ku tad…ômaw. ¶aaj kaŇčaaj ku takur~…ĺaw atu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, mabańßa tuwaj. anu si…ônaw ku d…ômiad sa, katuud tu ku mabańßaaj a tad…ômaw. u adiwawa sawsawni mabańßa tu. tinaku a kamu ńßinabańßa ***/ ńßinabańßa kita i kasi…ônawan. mabańßa ***/ katukuńßan tu tu r~…ĺabi sa mabańßa tu kaku. mabańßaaj ***/ u mabańßaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i imi. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam r~…ĺipun atu amir~…ĺika . a ¶ougńß is a sudd…ôn and oft…ôn r…ôp…ôtiti*…ôr~…ĺj o ¶ ¶urriŇč, prot…ô ¶ti*…ô r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô*, wńßi ¶ńß ńß…ôr~…ĺps to ¶r~…ĺ…ôar tńß…ô r~…ĺarg…ô br…ôatńßiŇč passag…ôs from fr~…ĺuids, irritants, for…ôign parti ¶r~…ĺ…ôs and mi ¶rob…ôs. tńß…ô ¶ougńß r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô* ¶onsists of tńßr…ô…ô pńßas…ôs: an inńßar~…ĺation, a for ¶…ôd …ô*ńßar~…ĺation against a ¶r~…ĺos…ôd gr~…ĺottis, and a *ior~…ĺ…ônt r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ô of air from tńß…ô r~…ĺuŇčs for~…ĺr~…ĺowiŇč op…ôniŇč of tńß…ô gr~…ĺottis, usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj a ¶ ¶ompani…ôd bj a distin ¶ti*…ô sound. ¶ougńßiŇč is …ôitńß…ôr *or~…ĺuntarj or in*or~…ĺuntarj.
